---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem this feature solves and the desired outcome.

## Proposed solution

Describe the approach/API/UX. Include alternatives considered if any.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.

## Impact

- Who benefits and how?
- Backwards compatibility considerations?

## Checklist

- [ ] I’ve checked existing issues/PRs for similar requests
- [ ] I’ve described acceptance criteria or success metrics
- [ ] I’m willing to help implement this (optional)
